series_metadata.series_description: This file contains Compliance Officer''s complete report after citing a permit holder, including statements of fact and violation notice, Form 8a.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area until case is closed; destroy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness. ; Microform: Retain diazo copy in the office area for 5 years, then destroy. Retain master microfilm in off site storage for 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Shred
